001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.historyLog;
002
003import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.HistoryLogProps;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Bytes;
006import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus.LastBGResponse;
007
008@HistoryLogProps(
009    opCode = 16,
010    displayName = "BG Taken",
011    internalName = "LID_BG_READING_TAKEN",
012    usedByAndroid = true,
013    usedByTidepool = true
014)
015public class BGHistoryLog extends HistoryLog {
016
017    private int bg;
018    private int cgmCalibration;
019    private int bgSourceId;
020    private float iob;
021    private int targetBG;
022    private int isf;
023    private int selectedIOB;
024    private int bgSourceType;
025    private int spare;
026
027    public BGHistoryLog() {}
028
029    public BGHistoryLog(long pumpTimeSec, long sequenceNum, int bg, int cgmCalibration, int bgSourceId, float iob, int targetBG, int isf, int selectedIOB, int bgSourceType, int spare) {
030        this.cargo = buildCargo(pumpTimeSec, sequenceNum, bg, cgmCalibration, bgSourceId, iob, targetBG, isf, selectedIOB, bgSourceType, spare);
031        this.pumpTimeSec = pumpTimeSec;
032        this.sequenceNum = sequenceNum;
033        this.bg = bg;
034        this.cgmCalibration = cgmCalibration;
035        this.bgSourceId = bgSourceId;
036        this.iob = iob;
037        this.targetBG = targetBG;
038        this.isf = isf;
039        this.selectedIOB = selectedIOB;
040        this.bgSourceType = bgSourceType;
041        this.spare = spare;
042
043    }
044
045    public int typeId() {
046        return 16;
047    }
048
049    /**
050     * <table border="1">
051     * <caption>Parsed fields for BGHistoryLog:</caption>
052     * <tr><td><code>bg</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readShort(raw, 10)</code></td></tr>
053     * <tr><td><code>cgmCalibration</code></td><td><code>raw[12]</code></td></tr>
054     * <tr><td><code>bgSourceId</code></td><td><code>raw[13]</code></td></tr>
055     * <tr><td><code>iob</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readFloat(raw, 14)</code></td></tr>
056     * <tr><td><code>targetBG</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readShort(raw, 18)</code></td></tr>
057     * <tr><td><code>isf</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readShort(raw, 20)</code></td></tr>
058     * <tr><td><code>selectedIOB</code></td><td><code>raw[22]</code></td></tr>
059     * <tr><td><code>bgSourceType</code></td><td><code>raw[23]</code></td></tr>
060     * <tr><td><code>spare</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readShort(raw, 24)</code></td></tr>
061     * </table>
062     */
063    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
064        Validate.isTrue(raw.length == 26);
065        parseBase(raw);
066        this.cargo = raw;
067        this.bg = Bytes.readShort(raw, 10);
068        this.cgmCalibration = raw[12];
069        this.bgSourceId = raw[13];
070        this.iob = Bytes.readFloat(raw, 14);
071        this.targetBG = Bytes.readShort(raw, 18);
072        this.isf = Bytes.readShort(raw, 20);
073        this.selectedIOB = raw[22];
074        this.bgSourceType = raw[23];
075        this.spare = Bytes.readShort(raw, 24);
076        
077    }
078
079    
080    /**
081     * <table border="1">
082     * <caption>Byte layout for BGHistoryLog.buildCargo(...):</caption>
083     * <tr><th>Offset</th><th>Description</th></tr>
084     * <tr><td>0</td><td><code>new byte[]{16} [element 0]</code></td></tr>
085     * <tr><td>1</td><td><code>new byte[]{0} [element 1]</code></td></tr>
086     * <tr><td>2</td><td><code>toUint32(pumpTimeSec) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
087     * <tr><td>3</td><td><code>toUint32(pumpTimeSec) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
088     * <tr><td>4</td><td><code>toUint32(pumpTimeSec) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
089     * <tr><td>5</td><td><code>toUint32(pumpTimeSec) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
090     * <tr><td>6</td><td><code>toUint32(sequenceNum) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
091     * <tr><td>7</td><td><code>toUint32(sequenceNum) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
092     * <tr><td>8</td><td><code>toUint32(sequenceNum) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
093     * <tr><td>9</td><td><code>toUint32(sequenceNum) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
094     * <tr><td>10</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(bg) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
095     * <tr><td>11</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(bg) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
096     * <tr><td>12</td><td><code>(byte) cgmCalibration</code></td></tr>
097     * <tr><td>13</td><td><code>(byte) bgSource</code></td></tr>
098     * <tr><td>14</td><td><code>toFloat(iob) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
099     * <tr><td>15</td><td><code>toFloat(iob) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
100     * <tr><td>16</td><td><code>toFloat(iob) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
101     * <tr><td>17</td><td><code>toFloat(iob) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
102     * <tr><td>18</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(targetBG) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
103     * <tr><td>19</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(targetBG) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
104     * <tr><td>20</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(isf) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
105     * <tr><td>21</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(isf) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
106     * <tr><td>22</td><td><code>(byte) selectedIOB</code></td></tr>
107     * <tr><td>23</td><td><code>(byte) bgSourceType</code></td></tr>
108     * <tr><td>24</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(spare) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
109     * <tr><td>25</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(spare) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
110     * </table>
111     */
112    public static byte[] buildCargo(long pumpTimeSec, long sequenceNum, int bg, int cgmCalibration, int bgSource, float iob, int targetBG, int isf, int selectedIOB, int bgSourceType, int spare) {
113        return Bytes.combine(
114            new byte[]{ 16, 0 },
115            Bytes.toUint32(pumpTimeSec),
116            Bytes.toUint32(sequenceNum),
117            Bytes.firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(bg),
118            new byte[]{ (byte) cgmCalibration },
119            new byte[]{ (byte) bgSource },
120            Bytes.toFloat(iob),
121            Bytes.firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(targetBG),
122            Bytes.firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(isf),
123            new byte[]{ (byte) selectedIOB },
124            new byte[]{ (byte) bgSourceType },
125            Bytes.firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(spare));
126    }
127
128    /**
129     * @return the BG entry in mg/dL
130     */
131    public int getBg() {
132        return bg;
133    }
134
135    /**
136     * @return TODO(unknown)
137     */
138    public int getCgmCalibration() {
139        return cgmCalibration;
140    }
141
142    public int getBgSourceId() {
143        return bgSourceId;
144    }
145
146    /**
147     * @return the source of the BG entry (CGM or manual)
148     */
149    public LastBGResponse.BgSource getBgSource() {
150        return LastBGResponse.BgSource.fromId(bgSourceId);
151    }
152
153    /**
154     * @return the current insulin on board
155     */
156    public float getIob() {
157        return iob;
158    }
159
160    /**
161     * @return the target BG in the pump profile
162     */
163    public int getTargetBG() {
164        return targetBG;
165    }
166
167    /**
168     * @return the insulin sensitivity factor in the pump profile
169     */
170    public int getIsf() {
171        return isf;
172    }
173
174    public int getSelectedIOB() {
175        return selectedIOB;
176    }
177
178    public int getBgSourceType() {
179        return bgSourceType;
180    }
181
182    public int getSpare() {
183        return spare;
184    }
185    
186}
